title: primula franchetii subsp. forrestii
intro: Primula franchetii subsp. forrestii, also known as the Forrest's primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Primula franchetii subsp. forrestii include its potential to reduce fever, relieve coughs and respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including tea, infusion, and dried extract, although its usage and availability may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
